name: Banana Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the honey, water, egg, oil, and vanilla extract.
3. Add salt and poppy seeds (if using) to the wet ingredients.
4. Sift together the bread flour, wheat flour, and yeast in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
7. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with cooking spray or butter.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
